title: S3eed Item Trim
description: Adds a purple trim to all Netherite tools.
body:
## **S3EED'S Item**

 **This resource pack gives Netherite tools and the sword a new look with a purple trim. It keeps the original style but adds a bit of color to make them stand out.**

---

 _**❔ What it changes:**_

Netherite Sword

Netherite Pickaxe

Netherite Axe

Netherite Shovel

Netherite Hoe

---
 _**🎮 How to Install:**_

Download the pack (.zip file).

Move it to your resourcepacks folder.

Enable it in Minecraft Settings > Resource Packs.

---
**Enjoy beautifully designed Netherite Tools**

- **survival**
- **Content Creation**
- **Servers**
